feat.name: Stargazer's Eyes
feat.special: You can take this feat a second time, upgrading your low-light vision to darkvision.
feat.text: Long hours in darkened observatories have sharpened your senses. If you don’t have low-light vision or darkvision, you gain low-light vision, or if you already have low-light vision, you gain darkvision.

traits.name: Archetype
traits.text: This feat belongs to an archetype.
